subject: Add compare NodePort and Ingress scan
commit_message:
Add compare NodePort and Ingress scan

Add compare NodePort and Ingress scan to the
ONAP port scanner. Extra option --scan-and-compare
scan cluster using NodePort and Ingress and finally
compare the results of both scans.

Change-Id: Ie480f068c2bda530c8be76c3d8d70d92f7c5b392
Issue-ID: OOM-2437
Signed-off-by: Lucjan Bryndza <l.bryndza@samsung.com>

entries.message:

Patch Set 3:

@Lucjan,
could you provide here an example of output (you have access to daily master and ingress daily master to perform the check if you want)?

thanks!

Patch Set 3:

Hi Sylvain

If you want to make ingress and NodePort scan comparison you need to to call the script using following command:

./check_for_ingress_and_nodeports.py  --scan-and-compare 

Optionally you can enable verbose flag --verbose and you can also specify k8s config using following command --conf <config_path>

Example output should looks like bellow:



$ ./check_for_ingress_and_nodeports.py --conf ~/.kube/config.onap --scan-and-compare
Scanning nodeport services
aai     30233   [OK  HTTPU 403]

message-router-kafka-1  30491    [ERROR HTTP]    timed out
message-router-kafka-2  30492    [ERROR HTTP]    timed out

Scanning ingress services

aai     aai.api.simpledemo.onap.org     [OK  HTTPU 403]
aai-modelloader aaimodelloader.simpledemo.onap.org       [ERROR HTTPS]           [Errno 0] Error
aai-sparky-be   aaisparkybe.simpledemo.onap.org [OK  HTTPU 302]

sdc-wfd-fe      sdcwfdfe.simpledemo.onap.org    [ERROR  HTTPU 404]
dgbuilder       sdnc-dgbuilder.simpledemo.onap.org      [OK  HTTPU 401]

Patch Set 3:

Nothing is wrong here, but it can be wrong, it depends... NodePort list will never match with the Ingress port list. It depends on the configuration..... You are able to confirm only that matching node port give the same response as matching ingress port. 

But you can't assume or simply detect that non matching NodePort and Ingress are ok or not.

Voting -1 just for broken input arguments handling.

Patch Set 5: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-python-lint/197/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/integration-master-python-lint/197

Patch Set 5:

Colorama strip automatically control ANSI control characters from stdout when the script is running on nonTTY console (isatty is false). Under Win32 it's convert Ansi control characters to the Windows syscalls.

Patch Set 6:

Colorama: Pass True or False to override whether ansi codes should be stripped from the output. The default behaviour is to strip if on Windows or if output is redirected (not a tty).

Patch Set 6: Verified+1

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-master-python-lint/198/ : SUCCESS
